🎯 Helpdesk & Support

Ticketing, live chat, and customer support — open source alternatives to Zendesk and Intercom.

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Customer support ticketing and chat.

Conversational support and marketing.

Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Chatwoot

Open source customer engagement — chat, email, social inboxes.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Zammad

Ticketing system with email, chat, and telephony.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

FreeScout

Lightweight self-hosted Help Scout alternative.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

osTicket

Classic open source support ticket system used by many SMBs.

License: GPL-2.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆
